session.user: Run pytest unit tests and report results. Command: cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run pytest tests/unit/ -x -q --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -50

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest unit tests with short traceback

session.tool_result: ........................................................................ [ 1%] ........................................................................ [ 3%] ........................................................................ [ 5%] .......................................F =================================== FAILURES =================================== ___________________ test_serialize_plan_row_datetime_fields ____________________ tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_dash_data.py:27: in test_serialize_plan_row_datetime_fields row = PlanRowData( E TypeError: PlanRowData.__init__() missing 1 required positional argument: 'ci_summary_comment_id' =========================== short test summary info ============================ FAILED tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_dash_data.py::test_serialize_plan_row_datetime_fields - TypeError: PlanRowData.__init__() missing 1 required positional argument: 'ci_summary_comment_id' !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! stopping after 1 failures !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
session.assistant:
pytest failed: 1 issue found
**File:** tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_dash_data.py:27 **Test:** test_serialize_plan_row_datetime_fields **Error:** TypeError: PlanRowData.__init__() missing 1 required positional argument: 'ci_summary_comment_id'
The test is failing because the `PlanRowData` class now requires a `ci_summary_comment_id` argument that wasn't previously required. The test needs to be updated to provide this argument when creating a `PlanRowData` instance.
